changes.before: "It isn't surface damage. It's moving through the existing channels under the ward lattice, faster near settled roads."
changes.after: "The damage is in the existing channels under the ward lattice, moving fastest near settled roads."

changes.before: "The Kirin Tor did not send me. Nobody sent me. I came because this keeps spreading while people ask for permission slips."
changes.after: "I came without Kirin Tor approval because this keeps spreading while people ask for permission slips."

changes.before: "It's in the ground," she said. "Soil and water both. This isn't only running through the leylines anymore. The land's carrying it."
changes.after: "It's in the ground," she said. "Soil and water both. It's in the soil and the water now as well as the leylines."

changes.before: The corruption was not hovering over the land. It was feeding on it.
changes.after: The corruption had gotten into the land itself, working through the crops and the soil.

changes.before: That was the worst part. Not raised dead. Living flesh taught to keep going after sense and mercy had both run out.
changes.after: The worst part was the magic in living flesh, keeping it going after sense and mercy had both run out.

changes.before: Cyndia had fallen half a step behind in the way subordinates do when rank lives in the entrance and needs no announcement.
changes.after: Cyndia had fallen half a step behind in the way subordinates do when authority is obvious and nobody needs to name it.

changes.before: Sylvanas Windrunner let the silence tighten until the wards were the loudest thing in the cell.
changes.after: Sylvanas Windrunner waited until the wards were the loudest thing in the cell.

changes.before: The room drew tight around that question.
changes.after: Everyone in the cell went still around that question.

changes.before: Orders moved once; the shape answered.
changes.after: Sylvanas spoke once, and the escort dropped into formation.

changes.before: If it had reached this far up, then the land was no longer carrying a warning. It was carrying the thing itself.
changes.after: If it had reached this far up, then soil and water already held the contamination itself.

changes.before: "It's in the ground," she said. "Soil and water both. This isn't only running through the leylines anymore. The land's carrying it."
changes.after: "It's in the ground," she said. "Soil and water both. It's in the soil and the water now as well as the leylines."

changes.before: The staff crystal had begun to answer the land on its own, pulsing faint at the edges of her sight.
changes.after: The staff crystal had begun pulsing on its own at the edges of her sight.

changes.before: The corruption was not hovering over the land. It was feeding on it.
changes.after: The corruption had gotten into the land itself, working through the crops and the soil.

changes.before: Millhaven sat ahead under the dying light with the patience of a trap.
changes.after: Millhaven lay ahead under the dying light, still as a trap.

changes.before: Living flesh taught to keep going after sense and mercy had both run out.
changes.after: The worst part was the magic in living flesh, keeping it going after sense and mercy had both run out.

changes.before: That landed cleanly.
Being right was still not going to be enough.
That landed cleanly.
That was the worst part. Not raised dead.
changes.after: The worst part was the magic in living flesh, keeping it going after sense and mercy had both run out.

changes.before: Something in Sylvanas's stance settled into decision.
changes.after: Sylvanas's mouth thinned. She turned to Cyndia.

changes.before: It was carrying the thing itself.
changes.after: If it had reached this far up, then soil and water already held the contamination itself.
